progress_tail.summary: Added category chunking (family-kernel-chunk-size=12 default), remote-only RVV mode (--skip-rvv-local), and validated attention_sequence fullstack (pipeline+rvv_remote+cuda). Started non-elementwise multi-family run in remote-only mode and reached reduction chunk_001 rvv_remote in-progress before controlled interrupt for checkpointing.
progress_tail.next_focus: Resume coverage_non_elementwise_remote_cuda_v1 with --resume, then run elementwise_broadcast by chunks and aggregate all 7 categories for HEAD freshness.

progress_tail.summary: Fixed CUDA C++ dispatch for LLM-expanded reduction patterns: cumsum(iota+identity wrappers), row_mean(const+reduce_sum+cast+div), and expanded var_mean2d(9-op, Var/Mean outputs).
progress_tail.next_focus: Resume non-elementwise category batches with remote-only RVV + CUDA, then complete elementwise chunks and aggregate full196 evidence on HEAD.

progress_tail.summary: Resumed 7-family category coverage run with chunk_size=12 and remote-only RVV + CUDA; reduction/norm_activation/matmul_linear rerun now fully dual_pass, elementwise_broadcast in progress.
